description: Explain how to build or troubleshoot a formula for the selected data.
inputPlaceholder: Describe the formula goal and reference cells (e.g., "Need SUMIFS for column B when column C = Approved").
name: formula_help
title: Formula Help

description: Format everything and make it look nice an consistent.
name: format
title: Format

description: Spreadsheet audit to find potential issues and improvements.
inputPlaceholder: Add anything specific you want the audit to focus on (e.g., formulas, data quality, layout).
name: audit
title: Audit

description: Recereate this attachment, use formulas where possible
inputPlaceholder: Add anything specifc like page numbers or data to extract also if you want colors/formatting etc.
name: pdf
title: From PDF/Image

description: Map accounts or categories based on descriptions.
inputPlaceholder: Add the source of descriptions and target mapping details (e.g., "Column G has descriptions, map to categories on Sheet X").
name: classify

description: Inspect the selected range for data quality issues and propose fixes.
name: clean_up_data
prompt: Inspect the current Excel selection for potential data quality issues (duplicates, inconsistent formats, missing values). Propose a clean, step-by-step plan to fix the issues.
title: Clean Up Data

description: Recommend the best chart(s) to visualize the selected data.
name: generate_chart_plan
prompt: Analyze the current Excel selection and suggest the most effective charts to visualize it. Provide the reasoning, the specific chart types, and any Excel steps the user should take.
title: Generate Chart Plan

defaultInput: Column G = descriptions (Buchungstext), Column Q = classification labels
description: Fill blank Q labels by learning from column G descriptions with >=90% confidence per unique text.
inputPlaceholder: Confirm the text/label columns (e.g., "Column G holds descriptions, Column Q holds labels") and add any filtering details.
name: auto_fill
title: Auto Fill Column
